category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Couchbase Shell as a shell for Couchbase Server and Capella; official Couchbase docs describe cbsh as an interactive command-line tool for Couchbase clusters.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is couchbase-shell; official Couchbase documentation uses the display name Couchbase Shell.
docs_sources: Official couchbase.sh site is the product documentation surface; official Couchbase docs link to Couchbase Shell documentation and describe cbsh.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions Couchbase Server and Capella; official Couchbase docs describe cbsh database shell capabilities.
